nasb.text: Arabia and all the princes of Kedar, they were your customers for lambs, rams and goats; for these they were your customers.

esv.text: Arabia and all the princes of Kedar were your favored dealers in lambs, rams, and goats; in these they did business with you.

cnv.text: 阿拉伯人和基達所有的領袖都作你通商的顧客；他們用羊羔、綿羊和山羊，來與你交易。

ccb.text: 阿拉伯人和基达的所有首领都来做你的客商，他们用羊羔、绵羊和山羊来跟你交易。
